scripts.build:packages: npm run build:main -w @sitepilot/desktop && npm run build:preload -w @sitepilot/desktop && tsc -b packages/logging/tsconfig.json --force
scripts.test:e2e:setup: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node-sqlite.mjs && tsx tests/e2e/setup.ts
scripts.test:e2e: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node-sqlite.mjs && tsx tests/e2e/run.ts
scripts.test:e2e:smoke: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node-sqlite.mjs && tsx tests/e2e/run-suite.ts smoke
scripts.test:e2e:content: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node-sqlite.mjs && tsx tests/e2e/run-suite.ts content
scripts.test:e2e:all: node scripts/check-node-version.mjs && node scripts/prepare-node-sqlite.mjs && tsx tests/e2e/run-suite.ts all
